decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_nyc-dot matches the existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation, agency). The observation already resolves to this id — no different record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The logo for the New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT) is located in the top left corner.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_council-member-darlene-mealy matches the existing registry record entity_council-member-darlene-mealy (Darlene Mealy, person, Council Member). The observation already resolves to this id — no different record to link to.

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit, agency, operator of bus routes). Although the observation label uses 'Metropolitan Transportation Authority', the base_record_id already resolves to the NYCT subsidiary record which is the correct operator of the B46 bus route discussed in the source. The observation already resolves to this id — no different record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram shows a blue and white bus with the MTA logo on its side.
